---
title: "Subset CNV files for Rare CNS"
output: html_notebook
author: "Aylar Babaei"
date: 2026
---
In this notebook, we gather Rare CNS hallmark CNV evidence for Rare CNS DNA biospecimens.

This first pass captures `MYCN` amplification from the gene-level consensus CNV annotation table.

### Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Look for git root folder
root_dir <- rprojroot::find_root(rprojroot::has_dir(".git"))

# Get subset folder
subset_dir <- file.path(
  root_dir,
  "analyses",
  "molecular-subtyping-Rare-CNS",
  "rare-cns-subset"
)
```

## Input

```{r}
# Load Rare CNS DNA biospecimens identified in 01
rare_cns_dna_df <- readr::read_tsv(
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_dna_biospecimen.tsv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# Load gene-level consensus CNV annotation table
cnv_anno <- readr::read_tsv(
  file.path(
    root_dir,
    "data",
    "consensus_wgs_plus_cnvkit_wxs_plus_freec_tumor_only.tsv.gz"
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

message("CNV annotation columns:")
print(names(cnv_anno))
```
## Filter CNV table for Rare CNS DNA biospecimens

```{r}
# Keep only Rare CNS DNA biospecimens
rare_cns_cnv <- cnv_anno %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    rare_cns_dna_df %>% dplyr::select(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID, match_id),
    by = c("biospecimen_id" = "Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(match_id))

# MYCN amplification
# We assume higher copy number indicates amplification; threshold can be refined.
mycn_subset <- rare_cns_cnv %>%
  dplyr::filter(gene_symbol == "MYCN") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    MYCN_amp = dplyr::case_when(
      copy_number >= 4 ~ "Yes",
      TRUE ~ "No"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    biospecimen_id,
    match_id,
    gene_symbol,
    copy_number,
    ploidy,
    MYCN_amp
  ) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Collapse to one row per biospecimen
rare_cns_cnv_subset <- rare_cns_dna_df %>%
  dplyr::select(Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID, match_id) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    mycn_subset %>%
      dplyr::group_by(biospecimen_id, match_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        MYCN_amp = if_else(any(MYCN_amp == "Yes"), "Yes", "No"),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = c("Kids_First_Biospecimen_ID" = "biospecimen_id", "match_id")
  ) %>%
  tidyr::replace_na(list(MYCN_amp = "No"))
```
## Write outputs

```{r}
# Save detailed MYCN rows
readr::write_tsv(
  mycn_subset,
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_cnv_details.tsv")
)

# Save biospecimen-level CNV subset
readr::write_tsv(
  rare_cns_cnv_subset,
  file.path(subset_dir, "RareCNS_cnv_subset.tsv")
)
```
## Summary
```{r}
rare_cns_cnv_subset %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    MYCN_amp = sum(MYCN_amp == "Yes")
  )
```
## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
